config.title: Config Data
config.description: Configuration file for general simulation parameters.

purchased_feed_land_use_change_emissions.title: Land Use Change emissions from purchased feeds
purchased_feed_land_use_change_emissions.description: Purchased feeds land use change emission values used in the EEE module.

ARL_soil.title: ARL_soil data
ARL_soil.description: Characteristic soil information, including composition, slope, and layer details.

animal.title: Animal data
animal.description: Input data and configuration information for animal management decisions, herd attributes, and housing properties.

animal_population.title: Animal population data
animal_population.description: Animal objects that herd initialization draws from during the simulation. A similar file can be generated using the -I and -s command line arguments simultaneously.

economy.title: Economy data
economy.description: Energy prices used in the EEE module.

emission.title: Emissions data
emission.description: General emission values used in the EEE module.

purchased_feeds_emissions.title: Emissions from purchased feeds
purchased_feeds_emissions.description: Purchased feeds emission values used in the EEE module.

feed.title: Feed data
feed.description: Feeds available for each animal combination, purchased feeds and their prices, feed storage options, and user-defined ration percentages and associated parameters.

NRC_Comp.title: NRC Comp data
NRC_Comp.description: Nutritional information for each feed, following NRC (2001) guidelines.

NASEM_Comp.title: NASEM Comp data
NASEM_Comp.description: Nutritional information for each feed, following NASEM (2021) guidelines.

manure_management.title: Manure data
manure_management.description: Manure management decisions, including bedding type, handler, separator, and treatment information.

weather.title: Weather data
weather.description: Weather data used during the simulation, including date, precipitation, temperature, etc.

user_feeds.title: User Feed
user_feeds.description: Summary of feeds available for use in the simulation, including their RuFaS ID, short descriptors, and which nutrient composition file they are included in.

cornsilage 2023.title: cornsilage 2023
cornsilage 2023.description: Crop selection and detailed rotation schedules.

cornsilage Field.title: cornsilage Field specification
cornsilage Field.description: Field characteristics and references to field management specifications.

cornsilage manure_schedule.title: cornsilage manure_schedule.
cornsilage manure_schedule.description: Specifies manure applications to a field.

cornsilage tillage_schedule.title: Wheat 2021 Tillage schedule.
cornsilage tillage_schedule.description: Schedule of tillage applications for a field.

cornsilage fertilizer_schedule.title: cornsilage fertilizer_schedule.
cornsilage fertilizer_schedule.description: fertilizer is scheduled to be used.

alfalfa 2023.title: alfalfa 2023
alfalfa 2023.description: Crop selection and detailed rotation schedules.

alfalfa Field.title: alfalfa Field specification
alfalfa Field.description: Field characteristics and references to field management specifications.

alfalfa manure_schedule.title: alfalfa manure_schedule.
alfalfa manure_schedule.description: Specifies manure applications to a field.

alfalfa tillage_schedule.title: alfalfa tillage_schedule.
alfalfa tillage_schedule.description: Schedule of tillage applications for a field.

alfalfa fertilizer_schedule.title: alfalfa fertilizer_schedule.
alfalfa fertilizer_schedule.description: No fertilizer is scheduled to be used.

corngrain 2023.description: Crop selection and detailed rotation schedules.

corngrain fertilizer_schedule.title: corngrain fertilizer_chedule.
corngrain fertilizer_schedule.description: No fertilizer is scheduled to be used.

corngrain Field.title: corngrain Field specification
corngrain Field.description: Field characteristics and references to field management specifications.

corngrain manure_schedule.title: corngrain manure_schedule.
corngrain manure_schedule.description: Specifies manure applications to a field.
